# parametricImmersive

**Type Property**

Indicates a projection described mathematically by a model of camera lens calibration parameters. Parameters may be found in lens calibration metadata in [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMFormatDescription/Extensions-swift.struct/Key/cameraCalibrationDataLensCollection] with algorithmKind being [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMFormatDescription/Extensions-swift.struct/Value/CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection/AlgorithmKind/parametric].

## Declaration

```swift
static let parametricImmersive: CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.ProjectionKind
```
title: parametricImmersive
